titleStmt.title: SII 39.209: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 209. (A.R. No. 209 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. VĪRAPRATĀPA VĪRA SRIRAṄGAYADĒVA MAHARĀYA, ŚAKA 1499 (1577 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the sale of the right of sacred services like supervision, repairs (tiruppaṇi-nirvāhakaṇiyātshi) by Eṭṭūr-Tirumalai-Kumāra Tatāchārya, along with other trustees of the same temple, to Tiruppullāṇi Parāṅkuśaṉ of Tirumalai-tiruppati and his disciples, in order to continue the holy service without interruption. It also mentiones the items of sacred food like as Prasadam, Appam, Tōsai, iṭali etc., to be supplied to the temple along with the other items like betel leaves and nuts etc., regularly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirājaparameśvara pūṟuvatekṣiṇa paścima Uttaracatu samudrādhicura śrīvirapradāpa śrīviraciraṅkayadeva mahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 9 10 9ṉ meṟ cellā niṉṟa bahudhānya varuṣattu meṣaṉāyaṟṟu kṛṣṇapakṣattu daśamiyum somavāramum peṟṟa śravaṇa nakṣatrattu ṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇḍa coḻamaṇṭalattuc
candragiri rājyattu coḷiṅkapurappaṟṟu tāmalkoṭattu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻiyil viṟṟiruntaruḷiya perumāḷ poreṟṟu nayiṉār śrī paṇṭārattārum śrī kāriyam ceyyum yeṭṭūṟt tirumala kumāra tātācāriyar Ayyaṉum stalam Eḻuniṟuvākakāṟarum tirumalai tiruppati tiruveṅkaṭa muṭaiyāṉ śrī kāriya �ntārāna tiruveṅkaṭacciṟukkaṉ tiruppallāṉi śrī parākucaṉ tiruppaṇi piḷḷaikku
tiruppaṇi nirvākam śrīlāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi nāḷatu mutal Ikkoyil tiruppaṇi nirvākam tām kāṇiyāṭciyāka kaikkoṇṭu yimta nirvākam Oṉṟukku kiṟayamāka niccayittu śrī paṇḍārattukku tām kuṭutta paḻaṉākaram ø1000 yintap paṇamāyirattukkum yinta nirvāham tamakku kāṇiyāṭciyāka śiṣyaparamparaiyāka naṭappatākavum naṭakkum
yiṭattu yitukku tirukkovilil peṟumpaṭi ṉāḷ 1 kku pisātam 3 10 4§ Appam 3 tocai 3- yiṭṭalikku tiruvatticāmam mātamoṉṟukku yilakkai ø mukkāṇi mai6 100 mūn_ṛumām cantaṉa pākku veṟṟilaiyum maṟṟumuṇḍāṉa tiṅkaḷ tivasam tiruṉāḷ viceṣa vakaiyum sakalātāyamum yinta Ēḻunirvākattukku Aṟṟapaṭiye Eṭṭām nirvāhamāka Uḷḷa suvantrasvāmiya mellām paṟṟik koṇṭu tiruppaṇiyaḷukku Atikkam Orāḷai vaittu tiruppaṇiyaḷum
paṇṇivittuk koṇṭu śiṣyaparamparaiyāka Ācandrasthādhiyāka kāṇiyāṭciyāka sukhaktile yirukkakkaṭaivarākavum yippaṭi cilāśāsanam paṇṇikuṭutmaikku śrī bhaṇṭāram Olukalip perumāḷjiyar yivai tātācāriyar Ayyaṉ yivai Allāḷappar yivai kugātevippaṭṭar yivai tampiyāca vijayarākabhaṭṭar yivai cārabhaṭṭar yivai nampiḷḷai yivai dāsanampi yivai koyil kaṇakkar tiruppuṭkuḻi prayanu yivai tirukkaikkoḷar §
Digital edition of SII 39.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
